title: F. suffruticosa genome assembly and single-cell RNA sequencing data
author: Kim, Taein
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 1. single_cell: raw data of single-cell RNA sequencing; rep1 and rep2 of 10X Genomics, and Pip-seq T2 2. genome: genome assembly (fs.genome.fa) and gene annotation (processed_braker.gtf) used for single-cell RNA sequencing braker_utr.aa is a fasta file containing protein sequences correspond to the processed_braker.gtf file.
steps_raw: 1. single_cell: raw data of single-cell RNA sequencing; rep1 and rep2 of 10X Genomics, and Pip-seq T2 2. genome: genome assembly (fs.genome.fa) and gene annotation (processed_braker.gtf) used for single-cell RNA sequencing braker_utr.aa is a fasta file containing protein sequences correspond to the processed_braker.gtf file.
